item.description:
Forced Nasdaq delisting effective July 15

Nasdaq filed Form 25 to delist Catalyst Pharmaceuticals' common stock under Rule 12d2-2(a)(3). The delisting is effective immediately. Shares will trade on OTC markets.

item.title: 💔 Busted · DFNS
item.ns0:headline: SPAC subsidiary terminates LOI with payments tech target
item.description:
SPAC subsidiary terminates LOI with payments tech target

T3 Defense Inc.'s subsidiary-controlled SPAC, SC II Acquisition Corp., terminated its non-binding letter of intent with a payments technology company, effective July 12, 2026. The SPAC will not pursue the proposed business combination. The SPAC's sponsor is controlled by T3 Defense's wholly-owned subsidiary.

About: T3 Defense Inc. acquires and operates aerospace and defense businesses in the United States and Israel. It engages in supplying generators for iron dome launchers and defense systems; defense and aerospace applications, including GPS-denied navigation, 3D mapping, simulation systems, and AI training platforms; design and manufacture of motion control systems for military and civilian use; and distribution of advanced drone payload systems for defense and homeland security markets.

  • Counterparty: payments technology company (unnamed)

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · Forbearance · QIND
item.ns0:headline: Enters forbearance on $1.675M convertible notes; 19-month plan
item.description:
Enters forbearance on $1.675M convertible notes; 19-month plan

Entered a forbearance agreement with RB Capital Partners regarding two convertible notes with $1,587,439.64 outstanding. The company will pay $1,675,000 in 19 monthly installments through January 15, 2028, with a $30,000 timely payment discount. The holder forbears from remedies during the period, and the conversion right at $1.00 per share is reserved.

About: Quality Industrial Corp., an industrial company, engages in the provision of solutions for the liquefied petroleum gas industry. It offers design, supply, construction, operation, and maintenance services; consultancy and project management; repair and preventive maintenance; and billing and monitoring systems for central gas systems.

  • Counterparty: RB Capital Partners, Inc.
  • Deal value: $1,675,000
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-10
  • Expected Close: 2028-01-15
  • Next catalyst: First installment due July 30, 2026

item.ns0:headline: Sells megayacht for €30-35M; redeploys to tanker core
item.description:
Sells megayacht for €30-35M; redeploys to tanker core

Announced its decision to divest its 60m megayacht newbuilding, expecting gross cash proceeds of €30-35 million ($34.2-40M). The sale would eliminate a €26.5M capital commitment and allow redeployment to its core Suezmax tanker business. No buyer identified; transaction subject to definitive agreements and consents.

About: Rubico Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the tanker operations business in Greece and internationally. It owns and operates tanker vessels for the transportation of crude oil. The company was formerly known as Central Tactical Acquisitions Inc. and changed its name to Rubico Inc. in March 2023. Rubico Inc. was incorporated in 2022 and is based in Athens, Greece.

  • Deal value: €30-35M ($34.2-40M)

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · SNTI
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Celadon affiliate for CVRs tied to SENTI-202 milestones
item.description:
Acquired by Celadon affiliate for CVRs tied to SENTI-202 milestones

Entered into a definitive merger agreement with a Celadon Partners affiliate to acquire substantially all of its existing business and pipeline. Stockholders will receive contingent value rights (CVRs) providing future cash payments if specified development, regulatory and commercial milestones for SENTI-202 are achieved. The company will remain public with a streamlined structure retaining certain IP and early-stage programs. The transaction requires stockholder approval and other customary closing conditions.

About: Senti Biosciences Holdings, Inc., a clinical stage biotechnology company, develops cell and gene therapies engineered with its gene circuit platform technologies for patients living with incurable diseases. The company’s lead product candidates utilize off-the-shelf healthy adult donor derived natural killer (NK) cells to create CAR-NK cells outfitted with gene circuit technologies in various oncology indications with unmet need.

  • Counterparty: Celadon Partners SPV 35 Limited
  • Announced: 2026-07-14
  • Next catalyst: stockholder vote

The transaction is subject to stockholder approval and other customary conditions, with closing expected in Q3 2026.

About: Senti Biosciences Holdings, Inc., a clinical stage biotechnology company, develops cell and gene therapies engineered with its gene circuit platform technologies for patients living with incurable diseases. The company’s lead product candidates utilize off-the-shelf healthy adult donor derived natural killer (NK) cells to create CAR-NK cells outfitted with gene circuit technologies in various oncology indications with unmet need.

item.ns0:headline: Launches delisting tender offer for Klöckner & Co SE; Bafin approved
item.description:
Launches delisting tender offer for Klöckner & Co SE; Bafin approved

Announced the opening of the acceptance period for its public delisting tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Klöckner & Co SE not already held. The offer document was approved by the German Federal Financial Supervisory Authority (Bafin). No per-share consideration was disclosed in the filing.

About: Worthington Steel, Inc. operates as a steel processor in North America. The company offers carbon flat-rolled steel and tailor welded blanks, as well as automotive and electrical steel lamination stampings; and aluminum tailor welded blanks. It also offers warehousing, logistics, and materials management services. It serves automotive, construction, machinery and equipment, heavy truck, agriculture, and energy sectors. The company was incorporated in 2023 and is headquartered in Columbus, Ohio.

  • Counterparty: Klöckner & Co SE

  • Announced: 2026-07-15
  • Next catalyst: Acceptance period open; further details in offer document

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Preliminary · NPRFF
item.ns0:headline: LOI to acquire Artesian Fusion bottling assets for ~$1.5M
item.description:
LOI to acquire Artesian Fusion bottling assets for ~$1.5M

Nepra Foods entered a non-binding LOI to acquire substantially all assets of Artesian Fusion (bottling facility in Lewiston, ID) for total consideration of approximately USD $1.5M, structured as cash, seller financing, and contingent consideration. The transaction includes a trial period for operational evaluation; definitive agreements and closing are subject to due diligence, regulatory approvals, and CSE approval. No per-share price as it is an asset purchase.

About: Nepra Foods Inc. operates as a vertically integrated plant-based food and ingredient company. It offers frozen meals, plant-based meat and dairy alternatives, snacks, and spreads and baking mixes. The company sells its products directly to commercial food manufacturers and consumers under the CPG brand. Nepra Foods Inc. was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Centennial, Colorado.

  • Counterparty: Tsceminicum Bottling Company, LLC (Artesian Fusion)
  • Deal value: ~$1,500,000
  • Consideration: cash+stock+contingent
  • Announced: 2026-04-30
  • Next catalyst: Due diligence and negotiation of definitive agreements

item.ns0:headline: Wins HKIAC arbitration vs Juventas; awarded >RMB 100M
item.description:
Wins HKIAC arbitration vs Juventas; awarded >RMB 100M

Won the HKIAC arbitration against Juventas. The tribunal rejected all of Juventas's breach allegations, found Juventas wrongfully terminated the agreements, and awarded CASI well over RMB 100 million in wasted costs, interest, and legal costs. The award is final and binding.

About: CASI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, develops and commercializes therapeutics and pharmaceutical products in the People’s Republic of China, the United States, and internationally. It offers EVOMELA, a Melphalan injection for use as a conditioning treatment prior to stem cell transplantation and as a palliative treatment for patients with multiple myeloma.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · VEEE
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by USFM for 10% of pro forma stock; CVRs for legacy assets
item.description:
Acquired by USFM for 10% of pro forma stock; CVRs for legacy assets

Entered into a definitive merger agreement with USFM Corporation. Under the terms, Twin Vee shareholders will receive a pro rata portion of 10% of USFM's outstanding common stock post-merger. Additionally, a pre-closing CVR restructuring will distribute contingent value rights representing Twin Vee's legacy assets to existing shareholders. The merger requires stockholder approval from both companies and effectiveness of a registration statement, with a termination fee of $1.5M payable by Twin Vee under certain conditions.

About: Twin Vee Powercats Co. designs, manufactures, and markets recreational and commercial power boats. The company offers catamaran boats, dual hull vessels, and Bahama Boat Works under the Twin Vee brand; and V-hull boats under the AquaSport brand for use in recreational activities, including fishing, diving and water-skiing, as well as commercial activities, such as transportation, eco tours, fishing, and diving expeditions.

  • Counterparty: USFM Corporation
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-07-12
  • Expected Close: October 31, 2026 (end date)

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · CELC
item.ns0:headline: FDA approves REVTORPYK for HR+/HER2- breast cancer; launch late Q3 2026
item.description:
FDA approves REVTORPYK for HR+/HER2- breast cancer; launch late Q3 2026

FDA approved REVTORPYK (gedatolisib) for HR+/HER2-, PIK3CA wild-type locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer after prior endocrine therapy. Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 trial showed 76% and 67% reduction in risk of progression or death with REVTORPYK combinations vs fulvestrant. Celcuity plans commercial launch in late Q3 2026 and will submit an sNDA for the PIK3CA mutant cohort in Q3 2026.

About: Celcuity Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, focuses on the development of targeted therapies for the treatment of various solid tumors in the United States. The company’s lead drug candidate includes Gedatolisib, which selectively targets various Class I isoforms of phosphatidylinositol-3-kinase (PI3K) and the two mechanistic targets of rapamycin (mTOR) sub-complexes, mTORC1 and mTORC2 to treat patients with hormone receptor positive (HR+), human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 neg…

  • Announced: 2026-07-14
  • Next catalyst: Commercial launch late Q3 2026; sNDA submission Q3 2026

Valetudo Therapeutics LLC and CEO Chris Kim filed a 13D/A disclosing beneficial ownership of 9,617,954 shares (14.3%) of Liminatus Pharma. The stake includes shares received as consideration in the issuer's acquisition of InnocsAI LLC, plus 48,975 Series A Preferred shares convertible into 489.8M common shares subject to stockholder approval. The reporting persons may engage in discussions with management and the board.

About: Liminatus Pharma, Inc., a pre-clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, engages in the development of cancer therapies in the United States. It develops IBA101, a humanized anti CD47 monoclonal antibody, which is in Phase I clinical trial for the treatment of advanced solid cancers, including non-small cell lung cancer. Evaluates all options after failing to raise capital; going concern risk

Disclosed it has been unable to raise additional capital to fund operations and is evaluating all available options. The company also faces a registered agent resignation effective September 4, 2026, and has not appointed a successor. No decision has been made on any option.

About: SRIVARU Holding Limited invents, manufactures, and sells electric vehicles in India. The company provides electric two-wheeled (E2W), related products and accessories, and value-added services. It offers E2W vehicles under the Prana brand name. The company sells its products through experience centers and online channel, as well as to a network of dealer partners. SRIVARU Holding Limited is based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · EWTX
item.ns0:headline: Sells muscular dystrophy program to Servier for $1.55B cash + $1.1B milestones
item.description:
Sells muscular dystrophy program to Servier for $1.55B cash + $1.1B milestones

Completed the sale of its sevasemten compound and muscular dystrophy program to Servier for $1.55 billion upfront cash and up to $1.1 billion in regulatory and commercial milestones, for total potential consideration of up to $2.65 billion. The transaction strengthens Edgewise's balance sheet and allows it to focus on its cardiovascular pipeline, including EDG-7500 for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy. Edgewise expects to initiate a Phase 3 trial of EDG-7500 in Q4 2026.

About: Edgewise Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, discovers, develops, and commercializes therapies for the treatment of muscle disorders. Its lead product candidate, sevasemten, an orally administered small molecule that is in Phase II clinical trials, designed to address the root cause of dystrophinopathies including Duchenne muscular dystrophy and Becker muscular dystrophy.

  • Counterparty: Servier (Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC and Les Laboratoires Servier)
  • Deal value: 1,550,000,000
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-01
  • Expected Close: 2026-07-10
  • Next catalyst: Phase 3 trial initiation of EDG-7500 in Q4 2026

He also entered a margin loan agreement with JPMorgan Chase, pledging 17.6M shares held by Cummins Family Limited Partnership. The loan contains customary collateral maintenance and default provisions.

It operates through: Data Center Hosting Business, and HPC Hosting Business. The company offers infrastructure services to crypto mining customers; and GPU computing solutions for critical workloads related to AI, machine learning, and other HPC tasks.

item.ns0:headline: Acquires 70% of C3 Holding (CLS); $712M bought deal
item.description:
Acquires 70% of C3 Holding (CLS); $712M bought deal

Has irrevocably committed to acquire approximately 70% of C3 Holding, parent of Collecte Localisation Satellites (CLS), via a binding put option. To fund the acquisition, the company is conducting a bought deal offering of 20 million common shares at US$35.60 per share, raising $712 million ($818.8 million if over-allotment is exercised). The offering and acquisition are not conditional on each other; the offering is expected to close on July 14, 2026, while the acquisition closing depends on the sellers' exercise of the put option after French employee consultation procedures.

About: MDA Space Ltd. provides space technology solutions and services in Canada, the United States, Europe, Asia, the Middle East, and internationally. It offers satellite communications solutions, such as space-based broadband Internet, direct-to-device satellite communication, and IoT connectivity; MDA AURORA, a software-defined digital satellite product line; and autonomous robotics systems and services used to operate in space and on the surfaces of the Moon and Mars.

  • Consideration: cash

  • Expected Close: Offering: July 14, 2026; acquisition TBD
  • Next catalyst: Put option exercise by sellers after French employee consultation

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Leggett & Platt for 0.1455 SGI shares/LEG share; vote Aug 20
item.description:
Acquires Leggett & Platt for 0.1455 SGI shares/LEG share; vote Aug 20

Somnigroup (SGI) will acquire Leggett & Platt (LEG) via a stock-for-stock merger. LEG shareholders will receive 0.1455 SGI shares per LEG share, implying ~$10.89/LEG share based on SGI's July 7 closing price. The merger requires approval by two-thirds of LEG shareholders at a special meeting on August 20, 2026. Upon close, LEG will become a wholly owned subsidiary of SGI, with former LEG holders owning ~8.6% of the combined company.

About: Somnigroup International Inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, distributes, and retails bedding products in the United States and internationally. It provides mattresses, foundations and adjustable foundations, and adjustable bases, as well as other products comprising pillows and other accessories under the Tempur-Pedic, Sealy, Stearns & Foster, and Sleepy’s brands.

  • Counterparty: Leggett & Platt, Incorporated (LEG)

  • Premium: 13.7%

  • Announced: 2026-04-13
  • Expected Close: after August 20, 2026
  • Next catalyst: Leggett & Platt special meeting on August 20, 2026

Sells B Medical to Thelema for $63M ($28M cash + $35M vendor loan)

Completed the sale of B Medical Systems S.à r.l. to Thelema S.à r.l. for $63M total consideration, consisting of $28M cash at closing and a $35M vendor loan. The transaction closed on July 1, 2026 after a delay due to Thelema's financing issues. The vendor loan is secured by B Medical equity, bears 6% interest, and matures in three months.

It operates through Sample Management Solutions and Multiomics segments.

item.description:
Merges with Scipher Medicine; combined co to trade as SCIP; 32% ownership + CVRs

Chemomab entered into a merger agreement with Scipher Medicine. Under the terms, Chemomab will redomicile to the US and merge with a new parent, which will then acquire Scipher. Chemomab shareholders will own ~32% of the combined company pre-PIPE and receive CVRs tied to nebokitug milestones. The combined company will trade on Nasdaq under 'SCIP'. A concurrent PIPE of at least $30M at a $150M valuation is required. Closing expected Q4 2026, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

Completed the sale of the 357-room Marriott Fremont Silicon Valley hotel to SRE Acquisitions V, LLC for $53.0 million in cash, netting approximately $52.2 million after selling expenses. item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Nuvei for $2.75B cash; vote Aug-Sep 2026
item.description:
Acquired by Nuvei for $2.75B cash; vote Aug-Sep 2026

Agreed to be acquired by Nuvei (Neon Maple Parent Inc.) for $2.75 billion in cash, a 44% premium to the unaffected share price. The transaction requires shareholder approval (vote expected August-September 2026) and regulatory clearances, with closing anticipated in mid-2027. No action is required from shareholders at this time.

About: Payoneer Global Inc. operates as a financial technology company. The company offers customers with a multi-currency account to serve their cross-border accounts receivable and accounts payable needs through payment infrastructure platform. It delivers a suite of services, such as funds management, working capital, multicurrency accounts, and workforce management. It also provides various payment options with minimal integration required, full back-office functions, and customer support.

  • Counterparty: Nuvei (Neon Maple Parent Inc.)

  • Premium: 44%
  • Consideration: cash

  • Expected Close: mid-2027
  • Next catalyst: Shareholder vote (Aug-Sep 2026)

item.description:
Sells Gucci Beauty license back to Kering for ~$400M cash; license runs through June 2027

Entered a License Termination and Transition Agreement with Kering to exit the Gucci Beauty license. Coty will receive aggregate consideration of approximately $400 million, consisting of $250 million cash at signing and an additional $150 million (subject to up to $30 million holdback) by September 30, 2027. Coty will continue operating Gucci Beauty through at least June 30, 2027, and will sell sufficient inventory to support the transition. Proceeds will be used for debt reduction, reinvestment in core brands, and organizational optimization. The agreement also resolves all pending litigation related to the license.

item.ns0:headline: FDA grants accelerated approval for TRUTAKNA in IgA nephropathy
item.description:
FDA grants accelerated approval for TRUTAKNA in IgA nephropathy

Announced FDA accelerated approval of TRUTAKNA (atacicept-vymj) to reduce proteinuria in adults with primary IgA nephropathy at risk for disease progression. The approval is based on Phase 2b ORIGIN trial data showing significant proteinuria reduction. This binary regulatory outcome validates the drug's clinical profile and opens a new treatment option for patients.

item.description:

Crinetics entered a definitive agreement to be acquired by Vertex Pharmaceuticals for $85.00 per share in cash, representing a total equity value of approximately $10.0 billion ($8.8 billion net of estimated cash acquired). The offer price reflects a 101% premium to Crinetics' closing stock price on July 2, 2026. The transaction is expected to close in the third quarter of 2026, subject to Crinetics shareholder approval, expiration of the HSR waiting period, and other customary conditions.

About: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of novel therapeutics for rare endocrine diseases and endocrine-related tumors. The company’s lead product candidate is Paltusotine, an oral selective nonpeptide somatostatin receptor type 2 agonist, which is in a Phase 3 clinical trial for the treatment of acromegaly and carcinoid syndrome associated with neuroendocrine tumors.

item.description:

Announced its intention to voluntarily delist all outstanding common and Class C preferred American Depositary Shares (ADSs) from the New York Stock Exchange and withdraw their registration under Section 12(b) of the Exchange Act. Following the delisting, the ADSs are expected to continue trading in the U.S. through a Level 1 sponsored ADR program on the over-the-counter market. No action is required by ADS holders at this time; the company's shares will remain listed on B3 in Brazil as its primary trading venue.

About: AXIA Energia SA, through its subsidiaries, engages in the generation, transmission, distribution, and commercialization of electricity in Brazil. It also owns hydroelectric plants with a total capacity of 43,072.7 MW; 798.7 MW wind power plants; and 67,030.74 km of transmission lines. The company was formerly known as Centrais Elétricas Brasileiras S.A. - Eletrobrás.

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · FRMI
item.ns0:headline: Suspends proxy campaign after judge recusal; 70% votes in favor
item.description:
Suspends proxy campaign after judge recusal; 70% votes in favor

Toby Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi Inc., suspends his proxy campaign to call a special meeting after the presiding Texas Business Court judge recused himself an hour before a scheduled hearing, throwing off the timeline. Over 70% of votes cast to date supported the special meeting. Neugebauer reaffirms confidence in Fermi's future and pledges to monitor the board's execution on Project Matador, reserving the right to resume the campaign or pursue director elections at the annual meeting if needed.

About: Fermi Inc. develops next-gen private electric grids that deliver highly redundant power at gigawatt scale to support next-gen intelligence and AI computing. Fermi Inc combines cutting-edge technology with a deep bench of proven world-class multi-disciplinary leaders with a combined 25 gigawatts of experience, to create the world's largest, up to 17 gigawatts next-gen private grid, helping ensure America's energy and AI dominance.

  • Announced: 2026-07-03
  • Next catalyst: Court ruling on board's supermajority bylaw change

item.description:

Entered into a merger agreement to acquire Remix Therapeutics via a merger subsidiary. The combined company will be renamed Remix Therapeutics and trade on Nasdaq under the symbol RMTX. Lynx1 Capital, a 21% shareholder, is participating in a concurrent financing to support the merger.

About: Passage Bio, Inc., a genetic medicines company, develops gene therapies for central nervous system diseases. It develops PBFT02, a functional granulin (GRN) and gene encoding progranulin (PGRN) for the treatment of FTD caused by progranulin deficiency; PBGM01, a functional GLB1 gene encoding β-galactosidase for infantile GM1; and PBKR03, for the treatment of Krabbe disease.

Received a $1M non-convertible working capital loan from Kaufman Kapital, increasing the total principal under the Third Amended and Restated Senior Secured Promissory Note to $4M. Kaufman Kapital also sold 55,000 shares, reducing its direct stake to 445,000 shares, but continues to hold a convertible note with $2.9M principal and $700k accrued interest, convertible at $0.7582 per share, capped at 9.99% beneficial ownership.

About: BranchOut Food Inc., together with its subsidiaries, develops, markets, sells, and distributes plant-based dehydrated fruit and vegetable snacks, and powders in the United States and Latin America.
